hooks.command: sh -c '[ -n "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] || { echo "agent-guard: PLUGIN_ROOT env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; AGENT_GUARD_HOOK_HOST=codex "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agent-guard" hook-pre-tool'
sh -c '[ -n "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] || { echo "agent-guard: PLUGIN_ROOT env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; AGENT_GUARD_HOOK_HOST=codex "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agent-guard" hook-post-tool'
sh -c '[ -n "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] || { echo "agent-guard: PLUGIN_ROOT env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; AGENT_GUARD_HOOK_HOST=codex "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agent-guard" hook-stop'
sh -c '[ -n "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] || { echo "agent-guard: PLUGIN_ROOT env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; AGENT_GUARD_HOOK_HOST=codex "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agent-guard" hook-session-start'
